title: Pareto Analysis of Per-Feature Cost
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: LLM Token Efficiency
description: Interactive Chart.js dual-axis combo (sorted bars + cumulative line) showing the power-law shape of per-feature LLM cost.

educational.topic: Log File Analysis and Cost Hotspots
learningObjectives: Identify the vital-few features responsible for the majority of LLM cost using Pareto analysis on real-shaped data.
prerequisites: Basic familiarity with bar charts and percentile thinking

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Interactive Pareto chart with vital-few callouts
keyQuestions: What share of features explain 80% of cost?
Where does optimizing the long tail stop being worth it?
commonMisconceptions: Every feature deserves equal optimization attention.
The cost distribution is roughly uniform — it almost never is.
